articles.author: Lee Ying Shan
articles.title: Asia tech stocks rally as Nvidia earnings soothe AI slowdown fears - CNBC
articles.description: Asian tech stocks rallied as stronger-than-expected results from Nvidia eased concerns that momentum in artificial intelligence spending was cooling.
articles.content:
Asian tech stocks rallied in early trading on Thursday as stronger-than-expected results from Nvidia eased concerns that momentum in artificial intelligence sector was cooling.
